idea-plugin.name: AI Commit Message Generator
idea-plugin.description:
AI Commit Message Generator

Automatically generate commit messages using Ollama, OpenAI or OpenRouter based on your code changes.

Features

  • Add a button in the commit dialog to generate commit messages
  • Analyze staged changes and generate meaningful commit messages
  • Customizable endpoints, models, and API Keys
  • Provider switch in Settings for different model vendors
  • Test Connection button to verify provider configuration

Usage

  1. Configure provider in Settings → Tools → AI Commit Message Generator
  2. Open the commit dialog (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K)
  3. Click the "Generate Commit Message" button
  4. Review and edit the generated message
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • Support latest IntelliJ IDEA 2025.x
  • Rebuild from source with clean project structure

1.0.1

  • Added OpenRouter provider support
  • Enhanced diff retrieval for new/deleted files

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Generate commit messages using Ollama AI
  • Configurable Ollama endpoint
